personal.name: Akash Sharma
personal.title: Sr. Software Engineer
personal.about: Full-stack Sr. Software Engineer with 3.9 years building production-scale logistics and healthcare platforms. Led a frontend team of 5, shipped apps handling 1.5 lakh daily orders, and delivered end-to-end solutions across Flutter, React, Node.js, and Python.
personal.aboutExtended: I like building things that actually ship and get used. Whether it's a courier booking portal pushing 1.5 lakh orders a day, a Flutter app in someone's pocket, or a RAG system that makes the team's life easier — I care about the impact, not just the code. Based out of Mumbai, been at it for 3.9 years and still finding new problems worth solving.

projects.name: Courier Booking Portal — Blazepost
projects.summary: High-volume courier booking portal handling 1.5 lakh orders daily for channel partners of Shree Maruti Integrated Logistics.
projects.description:
Blazepost is the backbone of Shree Maruti's channel partner network. Partners log in, book shipments, manage their delivery routes, and handle everything from wallets to e-way bills — all in one place.

I own the entire frontend and contributed heavily to backend services including pincode management, rate calculation logic, and OCR-powered booking. Also guided and managed the rest of the frontend team.
projects.impact: 1.5 lakh orders processed every single day
screenshotCaptions: Login — Shree Maruti branding with SMILe CP mobile app promo
Dashboard — overview metrics, quick actions, and announcements
View Bookings — full order table with filters, status, and export
Credit Booking — order creation form with AI OCR and live charge summary
Pincode Report — 5,649 pincode mappings with state, city, and area detail
Rate Cards — weight-slab pricing across Local, Metro, State, and ROI zones
ZPL Thermal Label — auto-generated silent-print shipping sticker with barcode, QR code, and delivery details

projects.name: SMILe CP
projects.summary: Mobile companion to Blazepost — built entirely in Flutter for Android and iOS. Fully owned and managed by me.
projects.description:
SMILe CP is the Blazepost experience on mobile. Same powerful features, same workflows — now accessible from a phone. Built from scratch in Flutter, published on both Android and iOS.

This is my project end-to-end: architecture decisions, feature planning, code, and releases.
projects.impactDetail: Zero to shipped on both platforms

projects.name: Silent Sticker Printing
projects.summary: Zero-click shipment label printing using ZPL. The moment an order is punched, the thermal printer fires — no popup, no button click.
projects.description:
Traditional print flows show a dialog. This doesn't. When a booking is created in Blazepost, a ZPL template is generated and silently sent to the thermal printer. The sticker comes out without anyone touching a keyboard.

Built the ZPL template system from scratch, integrated with the booking flow, and handled edge cases like printer offline states and reprint requests.
projects.impact: Eliminated the manual print step for every single order
projects.impactDetail: Saves seconds per order — adds up to hours daily at 1.5L scale
screenshotCaptions: ZPL Thermal Label — auto-generated silent-print shipping sticker with barcode, QR code, and delivery details

projects.name: API RAG System
projects.summary: RAG system for API docs built on N8N. The team can now ask questions about any API in plain English — it searches the actual docs and answers.
projects.description:
Built two N8N workflows: one that chunks and embeds API documentation into Pinecone vector DB, and another that handles live queries — triggered by webhook, searches the vector store, then calls either Gemini or Grok depending on the query type.

This replaced the "ask a senior dev" bottleneck for API questions.
projects.impact: Team can query any API doc in natural language
projects.impactDetail: Supports both Gemini and Grok models

projects.name: Pincode Management System
projects.summary: Admin system managing 5,649+ pincode mappings for Blazepost — zone classification, state/city/area coverage, and courier partner serviceability rules.
projects.description:
The pincode system is the backbone of serviceability decisions in Blazepost. When a partner books a shipment, this determines whether the destination is serviceable, which delivery zone it falls in (Local / Metro / State / ROI), and which pricing slab applies.

Built the full admin interface for managing mappings, bulk Excel import, and the lookup API consumed live by the booking flow.
projects.impactDetail: Used live for every serviceability & rate lookup
features: Pincode CRUD with bulk Excel import
Live lookup API for the booking flow

projects.name: Prayog SAAS Platform
projects.summary: A full logistics SaaS for organisations without in-house tech. I led the frontend team of 5 and contributed across the stack — from React to GoLang backend.
projects.description:
Prayog is built for logistics businesses that want to automate their operations without building tech from scratch. White-label ready, multi-partner integrations, custom domains — it's a logistics OS.

I led frontend development (team of 5), built the complete COD management system with webhook + Excel + manual ingestion, and was involved in product planning with the leadership team.

Stack: React on the frontend, Python + Node.js + GoLang on backend, PostgreSQL for data, hosted on AWS.
projects.impactDetail: Involved in product planning + full-stack development
features: COD management with webhook / Excel / manual input
screenshotCaptions: Login — clean onboarding with company branding
Dashboard — orders, profit analysis, and revenue charts
Orders — full list with filters and status tracking
Create Order — single booking with live charge preview
Bulk Booking — CSV/Excel upload for high-volume creation
COD Management — remittance tracking and reconciliation
Rate Calculator — weight-slab pricing across service zones

projects.name: Prayog API Playground & Docs
projects.summary: Interactive API documentation and live playground for the Prayog logistics platform — partners can browse endpoints, test requests, and integrate without ever opening Postman.
projects.description:
Built the full developer documentation site for the Prayog SaaS platform, live at docs.innofulfill.com.

The site combines a structured API reference with an interactive playground — developers can authenticate, pick an endpoint, fill parameters, and fire a real request directly from the browser. Every response is shown inline with proper schema documentation alongside it.

Covers the complete API surface: authentication flows, order creation, tracking, webhook payloads, bulk operations, and partner management. Also maintains the legacy API reference so older integrations don't break.
projects.impact: Live interactive docs — zero Postman required
projects.impactDetail: Partners can explore and test the full API from the browser
features: Interactive API playground — test live requests from the browser
Full endpoint reference: auth, orders, tracking, webhooks
Webhook event documentation with full payloads
Legacy API reference preserved for older integrations
screenshotCaptions: New API docs — interactive Scalar playground with full endpoint reference for the Prayog platform
Legacy API docs — preserved reference so older partner integrations continue to work

projects.name: COD Management System
projects.summary: Multi-source COD reconciliation engine for Prayog SaaS — ingests courier remittances via webhook, Excel upload, or manual entry, then auto-reconciles against orders.
projects.description:
COD (Cash on Delivery) remittance tracking is one of logistics's biggest pain points — money from deliveries flows back through multiple courier partners at different times and formats.

Built a full reconciliation system in Prayog with three ingestion modes: webhook from delivery partners, bulk Excel upload, and manual entry. The engine matches remittances to orders and flags discrepancies for review.
projects.impact: Three ingestion modes — webhook, Excel, manual

workExperience.note: Build and maintain Flutter apps. Handle client queries, API + database design, and R&D beyond Flutter.

projects.name: Health Parliament
projects.summary: A professional social network built specifically for medical professionals — connecting doctors, nurses, and healthcare workers in a purpose-built platform.
projects.description:
Think LinkedIn but built for the medical community. Health Parliament lets medical professionals create verified profiles, join communities, read medical news, participate in surveys, and connect with peers.

Built end-to-end in Flutter with Razorpay for payments and a robust privacy layer (users can hide sensitive data from non-verified accounts).
projects.impact: Live on Play Store & App Store

projects.name: Humrahi
projects.summary: Diabetes management companion — tracks blood sugar, diet plans, step count via Google Fit, and connects patients directly with their doctors.
projects.description:
Humrahi is focused on making diabetes management less of a chore. Patients track blood sugar with visual graphs, follow diet plans, log steps automatically via Google Fit, calculate BMI, and can share PDF reports directly with their doctor.

Localization support means it works across different regions.
projects.impact: Live on Play Store & App Store
features: Blood sugar level tracking with graphs
Step count via Google Fit integration

projects.name: SWASTIK
projects.summary: Custom wellness centre app managing the complete patient journey — from pre-check-in questionnaire and e-pass to event schedules and doctor chat while staying.
projects.description:
SWASTIK handles everything at a wellbeing centre across three phases:

Pre Check-In: Medical test tracking, questionnaire, E-Pass generation, virtual signature.
Checked-In: Full event & schedule tracking, personal journal, custom music library, chat with doctor, help desk.
Common: Dual auth (OTP or password), push notifications, account deletion.

projects.name: SHE — Safety Health Empowerment
projects.summary: Health guidelines, Q&A, polls, and notifications app designed specifically for pregnant women.
projects.description: SHE is a Flutter app built for pregnant women. It surfaces health guidelines, runs Q&A flows, hosts polls, and sends timely push notifications — all in a calm, accessible interface.
projects.impact: Live on Play Store & App Store

projects.name: Patient's Union
projects.summary: Community forum where patients share experiences, post opinions, and connect with others who understand their journey.
projects.description: Patient's Union is a patient-first social platform. Users share experiences, participate in discussions, and find community with others going through similar health journeys. Built in Flutter.
projects.impact: Live on Play Store & App Store

projects.name: LMS In App
projects.summary: Learning management system module with Flutter WebView, SCORM/xAPI support, and offline course downloads.
projects.description: A Flutter-based LMS module integrating WebView for course delivery with full SCORM and xAPI tracking. Courses can be downloaded for offline use, making it viable for low-connectivity environments.

workExperience.note: First professional role. Built Flutter apps from scratch and maintained production apps. Handled in-app purchases, localisation, and ChatGPT integrations.

projects.name: Daily Journal
projects.summary: Scrapbook-style journaling app for writing notes and reading curated quotes. Built with Flutter and Hive for offline-first local storage.
projects.description: Daily Journal is a personal space for thoughts and reflection. The scrapbook aesthetic makes it feel different from standard note apps. Quotes are curated and refreshed daily. Hive makes it fully offline.

projects.name: Numerology
projects.summary: Numerology and zodiac app with multi-language support and in-app purchases. Built with Flutter and SQLite.
projects.description: Covers numerology readings, zodiac signs, and astrology content in multiple languages. Includes in-app purchases for premium content. Part of a broader suite of lifestyle apps at Touchzing.
projects.impact: Live on Play Store & App Store

projects.name: Palm Reading
projects.summary: Palmistry app that analyses palm lines to reveal personality traits, character, and fortune. Includes astrology integration, a horoscope, and a Magic 8 Ball.
projects.description:
Palm Reading brings the ancient art of palmistry to your fingertips. Users scan their palm lines and receive detailed personality insights and fortune readings crafted by experienced fortune tellers.

The app connects your unique palm lines with your astrology profile, offering personalised psychic readings and horoscope content. A built-in Magic 8 Ball adds a fun, spontaneous guidance feature alongside the serious palmistry content.

Built with Flutter and SQLite for offline-first storage. Premium readings are unlocked via in-app purchases.
projects.impactDetail: Part of Touchzing's astrology app suite
features: Personality & fortune readings by fortune tellers
Psychic readings linked to astrology profile

personalProjects.name: Stargaze
personalProjects.summary: Self-hostable observability platform. One docker-compose up and you have API logs, metrics, dashboards, and alerting integrations running.
personalProjects.description:
Stargaze is an open-source observability platform built for teams who want full control without the complexity of enterprise tools.

Pull the repo, run one command, and you get: API log monitoring, metrics dashboards, integrations with Email, Discord, Slack, Teams, and PagerDuty, RBAC, user management, API key management, and custom settings.

Built with React (frontend), NestJS (backend), PostgreSQL, Docker, and Kafka for event streaming.
features: Email, Discord, Slack, Teams, PagerDuty integrations
personalProjects.highlight: One command to spin up the full stack

personalProjects.name: Un-Secret
personalProjects.summary: Full social media app with posts, likes, shares, real-time chat, and video calling. Flutter frontend, MongoDB + Node.js backend deployed on Vercel.
personalProjects.description:
Un-Secret is a complete social platform built for fun and learning. Posts, reactions, following — standard social graph. But also real-time chat via Socket.io and video calling via Zego Cloud, all inside Flutter.

Backend runs on Node.js with MongoDB, deployed on Vercel.
personalProjects.highlight: Video calling + real-time chat in Flutter

personalProjects.name: Alphabet Animation
personalProjects.summary: Flutter package published on pub.dev that animates each individual letter of a word independently. Simple API, drop-in ready.
personalProjects.description:
A small but useful Flutter package: give it a word, it animates each letter separately. Great for splash screens, loading states, and onboarding moments where you want some character.

Published on pub.dev with a clean, minimal API.

personalProjects.name: Small Solution
personalProjects.summary: Hyperlocal marketplace connecting tradespeople (plumbers, carpenters, etc.) with people who need them — via direct call or in-app chat.
personalProjects.description:
Small Solution tackles the problem of finding reliable local workers. Tradespeople register, add their category and availability. Users search by category, find someone nearby, and connect via direct call or in-app chat.

Built in Java with XML layouts and Firebase as the backend.
personalProjects.highlight: Built in native Java before Flutter days

personalProjects.name: Chat with Documents
personalProjects.summary: Upload any document, ask any question — it reads the whole thing and answers in context. Built with Python, LangChain, and LLaMA2 13B, served via FastAPI.
personalProjects.description:
An AI chatbot that ingests your document, understands it, and answers questions from its contents. Handles out-of-scope questions gracefully — it tells you when something isn't in the document instead of hallucinating.

Built with LangChain for document parsing and chunking, LLaMA2 13B as the local model, FastAPI as the server.
personalProjects.highlight: Runs a 13B model locally, no cloud required

personalProjects.name: CAB Tracking
personalProjects.summary: Uber-style real-time cab tracking in Flutter — smooth marker animation, live polyline rendering, and progressive route erasing as the cab moves.
personalProjects.description:
Enter two addresses, a polyline appears on Google Maps. When the cab starts moving via Socket.io updates, the marker animates smoothly along the route. The polyline behind the cab gradually erases as it goes — exactly how Uber/Ola works.

Built to understand real-time map animation in Flutter.

education.college: Nirmala Memorial Foundation College - Mumbai University
